brandGenDir.label: Brand Gen Root
brandGenDir.help: Path to the .brand-gen root directory that stores brands, sessions, and config.json.

brandIterateMcpPath.label: brand_iterate MCP Path
brandIterateMcpPath.help: Path to brand-gen's Python MCP server entry point.

approvalMode.label: Approval Mode
approvalMode.help: How much the plugin should wait for output review before autonomous follow-up cycles.

brandIterateMcpPath.description: Path to the brand_iterate_mcp.py Python entry point.

approvalMode.description: Controls how much human approval is required between autonomous generation cycles.
